scope.principle: clients request actions; authoritative services decide and persist outcomes

globalInvariants: every account remains a personal consumer account even after one or more workspaces are activated
a workspace grants only its verified capabilities and never changes the personal identity
money, stock, capacity, eligibility, proof and fulfilment states are server owned
every state-changing command requires an idempotency key and returns the original result when repeated
price, quantity, tax, fulfilment, cancellation, refund, earning and payout terms are versioned at commitment time
a client may not declare payment, delivery, verification, proof approval, earning or payout success
expired price, stock, location, capacity or funded-work data cannot be used for an irreversible commitment
failures preserve the user's input and expose an exact recovery action

consumerCommerce.commitRule: order commitment requires fresh product price, selected quantity, fulfilment mode and retailer stock confirmation
consumerCommerce.retailerTimeoutRule: if the selected retailer declines or misses its confirmation SLA, offer or automatically request the nearest eligible retailer with fresh stock and reliable acceptance history according to the user's saved fulfilment choice
consumerCommerce.rerouteDisclosure: show the new retailer, price, fulfilment time and any changed term before money is captured or the order is committed
consumerCommerce.counterRule: counter pickup uses paid order and receipt identity without a mandatory pickup code; store staff confirm handover
consumerCommerce.deliveryRule: home delivery adds assignment, live status, proof and delivery issue states
consumerCommerce.stockFailureRule: a retailer stock failure is recorded against availability reliability and cannot be hidden through client substitutions
consumerCommerce.substitutionRule: no substitution without the customer's explicit approval for the exact replacement and price difference

wholesaleCommerce.advanceRule: an advance required by the supplier is held under the disclosed protected-payment rule and is not released merely because the purchase order was placed
wholesaleCommerce.releaseRule: release eligibility follows authoritative delivery and buyer goods-receipt state, subject to an open shortage, damage, invoice or quality case
wholesaleCommerce.manufacturerRecommendationRule: input recommendations are generated only from the manufacturer's verified finished-product catalogue and production activity
wholesaleCommerce.traderRule: a trader or wholesaler is not treated as a manufacturer and does not receive manufacturing-input recommendations

appointmentsAndServices.capacityRule: a confirmed booking reserves exact provider capacity and prevents overbooking
appointmentsAndServices.providerRule: doctor, hospital, salon, restaurant, tiffin, transporter and other providers use profile-specific fields and fulfilment rules
appointmentsAndServices.followupRule: clinical follow-up eligibility remains tied to the originating appointment and provider-defined follow-up terms
appointmentsAndServices.medicineRule: medicine publication and fulfilment remain unavailable until the licensed-pharmacy workflow is active at launch

ride.acceptanceRule: captain acceptance commits one assignment through an idempotent command
ride.fareRule: the quoted basis and all approved additions are retained for final fare review
ride.paymentRule: cash, UPI and card are supported after trip completion; a card may be authorized or held earlier but final debit follows the approved final fare
ride.reassignmentRule: a cancelled, unavailable or timed-out captain returns the ride to matching without creating a second ride

pay.rule: Pay is used when payment is the user's first intended action; commerce, ride, booking and work payments stay inside their owning journey
pay.duplicateRule: the same idempotency key cannot create a second debit
pay.truthRule: a provider callback alone does not finalize payment until reconciled to the authoritative payment record

workAndEarning.publicRule: all consumers may browse funded opportunities; accepting requires an eligible verified workspace or the shortest applicable workspace creation path
workAndEarning.assignmentRule: acceptance reserves only live funded capacity and never promises an unconditional income
workAndEarning.proofRule: proof requirements are opportunity specific and versioned before acceptance
workAndEarning.payoutRule: payable is created only from a verified outcome and the disclosed review or dispute rule
workAndEarning.monthlyPotentialRule: monthly potential uses live funded capacity, eligible throughput and current geography; it is a range, not a guarantee

creatorAttribution.rule: each earning retains funder, content or work ID, qualifying event, attribution-policy version, gross amount, deductions, net amount, dispute state and payout state
creatorAttribution.rightsRule: licensed reuse requires explicit scope, term, geography and consideration separate from ordinary publication rights

workspaceActivation.multiWorkspaceRule: one account may operate multiple separately verified workspaces
workspaceActivation.resolverRule: workspace type is chosen through the approved category-card tree and verified against profile-specific evidence
workspaceActivation.gstRule: personal identity is required; an applicable business may continue with GST pending while reminders and capability restrictions remain visible
workspaceActivation.consumerAccessRule: pending, rejected or suspended workspace status never removes personal consumer and social access

availabilityAndCapacity.rule: public availability is computed from owner schedule, temporary override, fresh stock or capacity, serviceability and active restrictions
availabilityAndCapacity.autoStopRule: new commitments stop at confirmed capacity without cancelling already accepted work
availabilityAndCapacity.staleRule: stale stock, slot, fleet or service-area data cannot be presented as confirmed availability

consentTiers.observe: may summarize and recommend without changing state
consentTiers.prepare: may prepare drafts, carts, replies or schedules for owner review
consentTiers.bounded_execute: may execute only saved low-risk actions inside exact amount, quantity, audience and time limits
consentTiers.always_confirm: money movement, publication, legal filing, health action, pricing exception, refund, payout or irreversible action requires explicit approval

agent.rule: every agent action carries owner, workspace, policy version, reason, limit, idempotency key and resulting audit reference

supportAndDisputes.rule: every issue remains linked to its order, booking, trip, task, payment or workspace record
supportAndDisputes.evidenceRule: evidence is append-only; later decisions do not overwrite original submissions
supportAndDisputes.moneyRule: refunds, reversals and clawbacks create compensating ledger entries
supportAndDisputes.resolutionRule: both parties receive the decision, amount or action, reason, effective time and appeal or support path
